---
title: "Tutorial 5"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-01"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(network)
library(intergraph)
library(sna)
library(igraph)
install.packages("ergm")
library(ergm)
library(tidyverse) 
library(haven)
```
```{r}
load(url("https://github.com/rensec/sasr08/raw/main/classnet.rdata"))
summary(classnet)
```
